scripts.deploy: powershell -Command "git add .; try { git commit -m 'website updates' } catch {}; git push; hugo --gc --minify; netlify deploy --prod --dir=public"
scripts.deploy-draft: powershell -Command "git add .; try { git commit -m 'website updates' } catch {}; git push; hugo --gc --minify; netlify deploy --dir=public"
